compiled_state.title: As a skill orchestrator, I want using-lockpick/SKILL.md to document kudos system triggers, point mechanics, and contributor ranks
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
As a skill orchestrator, I need using-lockpick/SKILL.md to document the kudos system so that session orchestrators understand what behaviors are recognized and rewarded.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- using-lockpick/SKILL.md: ## Kudos System Awareness section added
- Section includes: active trigger list (all Epic 1 + Epic 2 triggers), point display format, jitter interpretation (Award = BasePoints x 1/(n+1) x [0.8,1.2]), contributor rank thresholds
- Written ONLY after K, L, and Epic 1 Story C (8d6e-b6f0) complete — reflects actual implementation

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Safeguard] using-lockpick/SKILL.md in plugins/dso/skills/ — may be safeguard file; task descriptions must name it
- [Sequence] Depends on M (agent contracts), K (T1/T2), L (T4), Epic 1 Story C (shell triggers)
